name: int4-mtp-bi0-int4head-surgattn3d
description: PR #797 STACK arm: int4_mtp_bi0_int4head (int4 W4A16 body + int4 g32 lm_head + QAT-matched gemma4_assistant MTP drafter, VLLM_BATCH_INVARIANT=0) with ONE delta vs that CONTROL submission: the surgical force-2D TRITON_ATTN patch is DISABLED (sitecustomize.py omits its install hook), so the native 3D split-KV (flash-decoding) attention path runs on the M=1 decode forward instead of the force-2D single-pass path. Measures whether the int4head weight-read lever (#788) and the surgattn-3D attention-kernel lever (wirbel #785) COMPOUND. Dropping force-2D gives up byte-exact greedy identity (#784-band candidate: PPL<=2.42, identity optional). model_id is the SAME LOCAL int4-head build path as CONTROL (build_lmhead_quant.py --num-bits 4 --head-group-size 32); publish to a Hub repo before any HF Job.
